Tổng tiền hàng: 3 × 18,000,000 = 54,000,000 VND  
Phí vận chuyển: 29,750 VND  
Tong cong: 54029750 VND

results.question: Mua 4 xiaomi, ship TP HCM - tong cong bao nhieu VND? lien he email minh.tran@yahoo.com

results.question: Mua 4 iPad ap dung ma VIP20 giao Da Nang, tong thanh toan bao nhieu?
results.answer:
iPad: 4 cái, đơn giá 18,000,000 VND  
Subtotal = 4 * 18,000,000 = 72,000,000 VND  
Giảm giá VIP20 (20%) = 72,000,000 * (100-20) // 100 = 57,600,000 VND  
Phí ship Da Nang = 39,000 VND  
Tong cong: 57,639,000 VND

results.question: Mua 3 iPad giao den hà nội - tong cong bao nhieu VND?

Phí ship Hà Nội: 31,750 VND  
Tong cong: 54031750 VND

results.question: Mua 4 MacBook dung ma WINNER, ship Hai Phong - tong cong bao nhieu VND?
results.answer:
MacBook: subtotal = 4 * 35,000,000 = 140,000,000 VND  
Giảm giá WINNER (10%): discounted = 140,000,000 * (100-10) // 100 = 126,000,000 VND  
Phí ship Hai Phong: 55,000 VND  
Tong cong: 126,055,000 VND
